props.heading: Everything You Need to Launch

features.title: Drag & Drop Editor
features.description: Intuitive visual editor with 20+ production-ready components. Arrange, resize, and customize without touching code.

features.title: One-Click Deploy
features.description: Publish to Vercel instantly. Your site is live in under 60 seconds with automatic HTTPS and a global CDN.

features.title: Fully Responsive
features.description: Every component adapts beautifully to phones, tablets, and desktops — automatic, no extra work required.

features.title: Beautiful by Default
features.description: Professionally designed components that look polished right out of the box. Customize colors and content freely.

features.title: Auto-Save
features.description: Your work is saved automatically every few seconds. Never lose progress, even if you close the browser.

features.title: Secure & Fast
features.description: Built on Next.js and Vercel — enterprise-grade infrastructure with security and performance baked in.

props.subheading: Powerful tools designed for creators, marketers, and teams who want results without the complexity.

testimonials.quote: I launched my portfolio in under an hour. The drag-and-drop is genuinely smooth and the publish button actually works.
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.quote: We replaced a $200/month Webflow subscription with this. Same quality output, way more control over the code.
testimonials.author: Marcus Williams

testimonials.quote: The preview mode is perfect for showing clients designs before going live. The whole workflow feels polished.
testimonials.author: Priya Patel

props.heading: Ready to Build Your Site?
